name: amazon-deals
description: Custom MCP tool for amazon.com: findDeals navigates to Today's Deals and returns discounted products.

tools.name: findDeals
tools.description: Navigates to amazon.com's Today's Deals page, reads it, and returns discounted products (title, price, discount, url). Self-contained: it handles its own navigation and returns a small result in a single call.

tools.name: finish
tools.description: Call when the task is complete. Pass a short result summary; its value is the final result.
